title: Decorative Lattices
body:
![lattices](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/3350f40d230b526867b44cc3a85e7460ebdf0ccb.png)

Decorative Lattices is a Minecraft mod that adds a wide variety of lattices and walls to your game.

With this mod you will be able to use different types of lattices to create intricate and 
elegant designs in your constructions.

### IMPORTANT UPDATE

Starting with this version, concrete lattices have been removed from the Decorative Lattices mod.

You can now find them in a new standalone mod, Decorative Concrete Lattices, dedicated exclusively to concrete blocks and decorations.

**Decorative Concrete Lattices**
[https://modrinth.com/mod/decorative-concrete-lattices](https://modrinth.com/mod/decorative-concrete-lattices)


The space left by the concrete lattices has been used to add new lattice variants, made from the following materials:

**Cobbled Deepslate, Deepslate, Tuff, Polished Tuff, Brick, Mud, Nether Brick, Resin, Basalt, Blackstone, End Stone, Calcite, Dripstone**

------------------------------------------------------------

Please note that all concrete lattices have been removed from the Decorative Lattices mod. This means that when you update your world, all existing concrete lattices will disappear. 

Concrete lattices are available up to the following mod versions:

From 1.18 to 1.20.4, and up to 1.8 of the mod.

From 1.20.6 to 1.1 of the mod.

From 1.21 and 1.21.1 to 1.0 of the mod.

From then on, concrete lattices will no longer be available in the Decorative Lattices mod.

Celosias are composed of:

Stone, Granite, Diorite, Andesite, Cobblestone, Sandstone, Red sandstone, Quartz, Cobbled Deepslate, Deepslate, Tuff, Polished Tuff, 
Brick, Mud, Nether Brick, Resin, Basalt, Blackstone, End Stone, Calcite, Dripstone.

![lattices](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cf7cebef3e7c8f05fc0c004ee43b844885f082ad.png)

![wall, wall frame, gate](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e53d77f169d0cd447e4402f1941f171dd1348391.png)
